name: Carrot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Place eggs, sugar, oil, and carrots in a mixer bowl; beat until creamy.
2. Add vanilla and mix well.
3. In another bowl, stir together flour, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, raisins, and walnuts.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the egg mixture, stirring until smooth.
5. Pour batter into an 11″ by 15″ jelly roll pan sprayed with nonstick spray or greased with margarine.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25–30 minutes, or until bars are firm in the center.
7. Remove from oven and let cool to room temperature.
8. Cut into four-by-seven-inch pieces.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 17g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 135
